reviewAreas: Intake basis traceability and recorded scope
descriptor-anchored commit, recovery, staging, backup, replace, delete, and cleanup boundaries
ready, draft, closed, and superseded lifecycle invariants
evidence family and specification resolution profile semantics
final report and worktree evidence sequencing

resolvedFindings.finding: Explicit ready-to-draft transition retained stale semantic readiness.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Added a failing regression test and reused atomic semantic readiness invalidation for the transition.

resolvedFindings.finding: A symlinked .manager/transactions parent could redirect staging and backup state outside the package.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Added failing escape tests and moved package-relative transaction operations to no-follow directory descriptors.

resolvedFindings.finding: A parent directory could be replaced by a symlink after path validation and before commit use.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Reproduced the race, added an adversarial between-check-and-use test, and anchored commit and recovery to the same package descriptor.

resolvedFindings.finding: The canonical codex exec invocation placed --ask-for-approval after the exec subcommand and was rejected by the installed CLI.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Corrected the invocation, parser-smoke-tested it, and added Work Unit readiness validation plus regression coverage.

resolvedFindings.finding: Worktree inspect evidence was captured before final report changes and became stale.
resolvedFindings.resolution: Made report-before-inspect and second-capture changed-path verification mandatory in the execution and agent rules.
